MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-22-2021 - APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY JOHN CHU, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF, ZHEN QUIANG LIANG; SAMUEL LEFF, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT XIU YUN CHEN -- THE COURT ASSIGNED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE GARRETT WONG IN DEPT. 504. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPT. 504 BY 4:30 PM TODAY VIA THE EMAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL REGARDING SCHEDULING OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COURTROOM TELEPHONE NUMBER OF (415) 551-3772 WAS ALSO PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES AT TRIAL CALL. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON MAR-24-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL FOR THE NEXT TRIAL CALL. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
